title: Greenidge Generation 2024 Full Year Results and Q4 Performance
text: Greenidge Generation 2024 Full Year and Q4 Results. Full Year 2024 Results: Total revenue $59.5 million. SG&A expense reduction $8.9 million compared to 2023. Q4 2024 Revenue Results: Total revenue $14.8 million. Revenue increase of $2.4 million from Q3 2024. Revenue composition: Cryptocurrency datacenter self-mining $4.0 million. Hosting operations $7.3 million. Power and capacity services $3.5 million. Mining Operations Summary: 122 MW total power capability. 8000 owned miners in operation across four sites. Fleet efficiency 23.8 J/TH. 15 MW mining buildouts completed in Mississippi and North Dakota. Strategic Initiatives: Bitcoin holdings over 85 BTC as of Q4 2024. Self-mined bitcoin retention strategy implemented August 2024. Debt reduction $5.2 million through debt-for-equity exchanges. Future Outlook: Exploring acquisition of sites with over 200 MW power assets. Plans to reach 146.5 MW capacity by end of 2025.
